description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master, pull requests, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: unix-like, linux_lint, and windows. The unix-like job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-20.04 and macos-10.15 with various compilers, libraries, and benchmarks. The linux_lint job runs on ubuntu-20.04 and lints the code. The windows job runs on windows-2019 and windows-2016 with various Python architectures and benchmarks.
